patches.name: Show deleted messages
patches.description: Preserves content of deleted messages and shows them in the chat list.

patches.name: Disable analytics
patches.description: Disables Mixpanel event tracking and Firebase Analytics collection.

patches.name: Disable Crashlytics
patches.description: Prevents crash reports from being sent to Firebase Crashlytics.

patches.name: Disable Flarelane push
patches.description: Disables Flarelane push marketing SDK initialization.

patches.name: Bypass purchase terms agreement
patches.description: Skips the purchase terms agreement screen by always reporting it as agreed.

patches.name: Disable app reload prompt
patches.description: Always returns false for shouldReloadApp, preventing forced app restarts.

patches.name: SSL pinning bypass
patches.description: Adds a network security config to bypass SSL certificate pinning.

patches.name: Force update bypass
patches.description: Skips mandatory version update check by always returning Success.
